positive: A symmetrical, detailed mandala composition featuring interconnected elements of whimsical forest life and celestial geometry. Focus on stylized woodland animals (deer, fox, owl) integrated with bioluminescent flowers, crescent moons, and star clusters. Use a color palette of deep sapphire blue, forest emerald green, aged gold, and soft cream. The artwork must have clean, strong silhouettes and high contrast, resembling a screen-printed zentangle or engraved botanical sketch. Central composition, perfect for apparel placement. Highly detailed, volumetric lighting, magical realism, intricate pattern design, flat vector illustration mixed with organic textures.
negative: blurry, low detail, watermark, text, signature, logo, poorly drawn, out of frame, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grain, grain noise, artifacts, ugly, cartoon, photorealistic
